prompt: 写一个 Unity Editor 测试脚本。功能：点击菜单 'Tools/Frame Debugger/Capture All Events' 后，启动 FrameDebugger，逐帧遍历当前所有 drawcall 事件，提取每个事件的 shaderName、passName、lightMode、passIndex、shaderKeywords，输出到 CSV 文件保存到 Assets/FrameDebuggerOutput/events.csv。使用 FrameDebuggerReflect 工具类。

assertions.name: has-menuitem-attribute
assertions.text: Has [MenuItem] attribute on the start method

assertions.name: uses-editor-application-update
assertions.text: Uses EditorApplication.update as the capture loop tick mechanism

assertions.name: sets-limit-per-event
assertions.text: Sets FrameDebuggerReflect.SetLimit per event iteration (limit = targetIndex + 1 pattern)

assertions.name: three-phase-loop
assertions.text: Has three distinct phases in the update loop: wait for events, iterate with limit, cleanup on completion

assertions.name: csv-output
assertions.text: Writes CSV output with headers including shaderName/passName/lightMode/passIndex/shaderKeywords columns

assertions.name: cleanup-on-done
assertions.text: Removes EditorApplication.update handler and disables FrameDebugger in completion/cleanup path

assertions.name: csv-escaping
assertions.text: Has proper CSV escaping for special characters (commas, quotes, newlines)

assertions.name: repaint-on-empty
assertions.text: Calls RepaintAllViews or equivalent when event count is 0 to trigger event population
